title: strophanthus puberulus
intro: Strophanthus puberulus is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its heart-stimulating effects, due to the presence of cardiac glycosides such as strophanthin. The health benefits of Strophanthus puberulus include the treatment of heart failure, cardiomyopathy, and other cardiac conditions, as well as its potential application in the management of arrhythmias and hypertension. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried roots or extracts, which are used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity and side effects.
